_comment: Local-dev MCP config for nci-mcp. Copy into your IDE's MCP config (Cursor: ~/.cursor/mcp.json or .cursor/mcp.json). Uses the LOCAL monorepo build of nci-mcp (dist/index.js) and the LOCAL debug build of the nci binary. Both paths must be ABSOLUTE — relative paths will not work because the MCP host launches the process from its own working directory. Run `pnpm --filter nci-mcp run build` first to produce dist/index.js, and build the Rust crate (e.g. `cargo build -p nci-engine`) so target/debug/nci.exe exists.
